question: For a `Book` class with `title` and `author`, overload the `<<` (insertion) operator to allow direct printing of `Book` objects to `std::cout` in a readable format.

test_cases.expected:
Book 1: Title: "The Lord of the Rings", Author: "J.R.R. Tolkien"
Book 2: Title: "Dune", Author: "Frank Herbert"
Book 3: Title: "Foundation", Author: "Isaac Asimov"; Another message.
Empty Book: Title: "", Author: ""
